<!-- Thanks for contributing! Small PRs review faster. -->

## What does this PR change?

<!-- One-liner, plus bullets for each rule added/edited/removed. -->

## Type

- [ ] New rule
- [ ] Rule update / clarification
- [ ] Typo / link / formatting fix
- [ ] Tooling (Solhint, Prettier, CI)
- [ ] Skill or AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md update
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Each new / updated rule has both a ✅ Yes and ❌ No Solidity example
- [ ] Table of contents updated if headings changed
- [ ] `skill/SKILL.md` updated if rule titles changed
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally
- [ ] Sources cited in the rule body (EIP, Solidity docs, audit, release note, etc.)
